{{Quote|Give the evacuation code signal. And get to your transports!|Princess Leia Organa, to the final controllers remaining in the Echo Base command center during the Battle of Hoth|<ref name="TESB" />}}
This aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''controller''' served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He fought during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] from the base's command center, and was one of two final [[Controller/Legends|controllers]] still present at their posts, including [[Toryn Farr/Legends|Toryn Farr]], when [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] issued the formal order for all Rebel forces on the battlefield to disengage and begin the final retreat from Hoth.<ref name="TESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The major first appeared as an unnamed extra in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], portrayed by American actor [[Jerry Harte]], who was credited as the "Head Controller" at Echo Base. The [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] article [[Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth|''Who's Who in Echo Base'']], states that Jerry Harte played Echo Base [[Controller/Legends|controller]] [[Romas Navander/Legends|Romas Navander]], When In fact, the Navander role was portrayed by actor [[Burnell Tucker]].<ref name="TESB" />
